name: Casey Rocket
blurb: He became a fixture and later a regular on the live comedy podcast Kill Tony, and posts clips of his act to a large social-media following.
bio: Casey Rocket is an American stand-up comedian based in Austin, Texas, known for an eccentric, high-movement, riff-heavy stage style. He became a fixture and later a regular on the live comedy podcast Kill Tony, and posts clips of his act to a large social-media following.

timeline.ev: Named a regular on Kill Tony

bits.yt_title: Casey Rocket Outriffs Himself | Stand-Up On The Spot
